Home / Service Areas / Redmond

Handyman service in Redmond, WA

Trusted local professionals serving Redmond and surrounding communities

Serving Redmond, WA

South Seattle Handyman provides comprehensive handyman services to the Redmond, WA area. Understanding that many residents are affiliated with the Microsoft campus and other tech companies, we offer flexible scheduling and efficient service to minimize disruption to your busy lives. We cater to the specific needs of homeowners in Redmond, addressing everything from routine maintenance to complex repairs. We're experienced in handling projects of all sizes, from fixing leaky faucets and installing new light fixtures to larger renovations and home improvements. South Seattle Handyman is committed to providing prompt, reliable, and professional service to the Redmond community. We're here to help you maintain and improve your home, allowing you to focus on what matters most.

Redmond is home to the Microsoft campus and has a large population of tech employees. The area experiences mild, wet winters.

Handyman service Services in Redmond

Roof Moss Removal

Protect your roof from Seattle's relentless moss growth.

Learn more →

Gutter Cleaning & Repair

Keep Seattle's rain away from your foundation with clean, functional gutters.

Learn more →

Drywall Repair & Patching

Seamless drywall repairs for Seattle homes, big or small.

Learn more →

Deck Repair & Staining

Extend the life of your Seattle deck with expert repairs and staining.

Learn more →

Fence Repair & Installation

Protect your Seattle property with a sturdy, well-maintained fence.

Learn more →

Interior Painting

Transform your Seattle home with a fresh coat of paint.

Learn more →

Exterior Wood Rot Repair

Combat Seattle's dampness with expert wood rot repair.

Learn more →
